Subtype.Label: Subtype(s)
Subtype.Hint: Hold Ctrl / Cmd to select multiple subtypes.

HandSeals.Label: Hand Seals
HandSeals.Hint: Requires forming hand seals. Blocked while grappled or pinned.

HalfSeals.Label: Half Seals
HalfSeals.Hint: Requires partial hand seals. Blocked while grappled or pinned.

Mobility.Label: Mobility
Mobility.Hint: Requires freedom of movement. Armor may cause failure.

MaterialFocus.Label: Material Focus
MaterialFocus.Hint: Requires a material component or focus item.

Empower.Label: Empower
Empower.Hint: Can spend additional chakra to enhance effect.

PhysicalHealth.Label: Physical Health
PhysicalHealth.Hint: Requires the user to be in good physical condition.

Blocked.Grappled: You cannot perform hand seals while grappled or pinned.
Blocked.Health: Your physical condition prevents the use of this technique.

Perform.Failed: Perform check failed. Your action is wasted but no chakra is spent.

Empower.Title: Empower Technique
Empower.Hint: Spend additional chakra to enhance this technique's effect.
Empower.Label: Extra Chakra

Chakra.Insufficient: Insufficient chakra to perform this technique.
